subcodes.first_line: O i Kemuni na Kalou yalololoma! Au sa Vakavinavinaka vei Kemuni ni O ni sa vakayadrati au ka vukei au me u vakila na yal
subcodes.notes: auto-unlinked (moderate-ratio) from BH02896 — Opens 'thank Thee that Thou hast awakened me' (waking-from-sleep prayer); not Naw-Ruz day 2 prayer
